data.content:
Handoff for implementation
- Knot 4b66 is planned only; current workflow boundary did not authorize code changes in this session.
- Likely fix: src/components/stale-beat-grooming-dialog.tsx, make StaleBeatDialogTrigger pass through Radix DialogTrigger asChild props to Button. The regression was introduced by commit 394b9068 when the direct Button child was replaced with a custom component that drops injected trigger props.
- Use worktree /Users/cartine/foolery-4b66-stale-beats-overview, branch codex/4b66-stale-beats-overview, then bun install --frozen-lockfile.
- Verify by clicking the overview Stale Beats trigger and confirming the dialog renders; run lint, tsc, unit tests, and build before any commit/push.
